proposed_relations.description: Adding left turn bays at some intersections is a treatment component of the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study

evidence_refs.source_quote: add left turn bays at some intersections, prohibit left turns elsewhere
Safety Benefits - Reduce conflicts between pedestrians and vehicles - Reduce conflicts between through traffic and turning vehicles • Traffic Benefits - Reduces traffic congestion
